fixtures.purpose: Immutable output from the tagged capability handler for the isolated client contract.

procedure: Clone the upstream repository, detach at commit 9de9c25f620ff7f1ce0fd5457d596052d5159596, and verify tag v2026.7.7.2 peels to that commit.
Clear API_SERVER_MODEL_NAME, select the default profile, and construct APIServerAdapter with configured bearer key fixture-capture-key.
Invoke APIServerAdapter._handle_capabilities with Authorization: Bearer fixture-capture-key, parse the HTTP 200 response body, and preserve the complete returned object.
Serialize the parsed object with two-space JSON indentation and one trailing newline, then record the SHA-256.

semantic_assertions: complete handler response identifies hermes.api_server.capabilities on hermes-agent
fallback model is advertised exactly as hermes-agent
chat completions and streaming are enabled
additive runtime, feature, and endpoint fields are preserved in the immutable capture

fixtures.purpose: Canonical complete chat-completions stream with role, ordered content, tool progress, keepalive, usage, stop, and DONE records.

procedure: Inspect each documented SSE emission branch at the pinned source commit and tag.
Construct one LF-delimited sequence containing role, content, tool progress, keepalive, content, usage with stop, and DONE records in source order.
Replace runtime values with the declared deterministic fixture configuration, preserve one blank line between records, and update the reviewed SHA-256.

semantic_assertions: tool progress and keepalive records remain non-content events
usage accompanies the stop finish record
DONE follows the finish record as Hermes framing confirmation
